---
title: "Arms of Albany"
---

```{=html}
{{< $data := site.Data | default dict >}}
{{< $arms := (readFile "arms/arms.yaml" | transform.Unmarshal) >}}

<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 1rem;">
{{ range $arms }}
  <div style="text-align: center;">
    <img src="{{ .image }}" style="height: 200px;">
    <div>{{ .title }}</div>
  </div>
{{ end }}
</div>
